title: HEALTH CARE SERVICES - 211info
text: CHILOQUIN OPEN DOOR HEALTH CARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides health care services including annual exams (including gynecological exams), care for acute and chronic conditions, pregnancy testing, STD/STI screening, immunizations, sports physicals, mental health evaluation, health screenings, and assistance in enrolling with health insurance. 103 Wasco Avenue Chiloquin, OR 97624 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-1pm and 2pm-6pm. 1st, 3rd, and 5th Wednesdays of the month closed from noon-2pm. (541) 851-8110 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 851-8110 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurance. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Klamath and Lake Counties Services: Childhood Immunization Community Clinics Contraception General Medical Care Mental Health Evaluation Navigator Programs Pap Tests Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Vaccine Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CHILOQUIN OPEN DOOR
